evidence: Line 22: `curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/leanprover/elan/master/elan-init.sh -sSf | sh` — live shell-pipe in a skill file loaded into Claude context as instructions
description: Skill instructs Claude to pipe a remote shell script directly to sh with no integrity check
suggested_fix: Pin the script SHA and verify before execution, or vendor a local copy of the installer

evidence: Line 47: `subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, ...)` where cmd is an f-string built from user-provided workspace/task arguments passed via CLI args
description: subprocess.run with shell=True and user-controlled string argument — shell injection risk if workspace name contains metacharacters
suggested_fix: Build cmd as a list and use shell=False, or quote user-provided segments with shlex.quote

description: Setup script prints curl-pipe-to-sh install instruction for Lean elan; not auto-executed but propagates insecure install pattern to users
suggested_fix: Document a verification step (check script SHA) alongside the install command

description: Setup wizard prints curl-pipe-to-sh install instruction for Lean elan at lines 229, 560, and 1136
suggested_fix: Document a verification step alongside the install command or use a package manager instead

evidence: Agents `codebase-locator`, `codebase-analyzer`, `codebase-pattern-finder` referenced in prompt body — none exist in .claude/agents/
description: Agent references three non-existent sub-agents by name; Task spawns will fail at runtime
suggested_fix: Remove references or create the missing agent stubs; the tasks can be handled by scout/oracle/architect directly

evidence: Agent Reference table in maestro.md lists `turbo`, `pioneer`, `nexus` — none exist in .claude/agents/
description: Maestro's agent registry is stale; references three deleted agents that no longer exist
suggested_fix: Remove or update the Agent Reference table entries to match existing agents

evidence: Prompt instructs loading `.claude/skills/debug/SKILL.md` — path does not exist; no `debug/` skill folder found
description: Agent references a non-existent skill path; skill will silently not load
suggested_fix: Create `.claude/skills/debug/SKILL.md` as a stub, or update reference to an existing debugging skill

evidence: Prompt references `.claude/skills/create_plan/SKILL.md` — no `create_plan/` folder exists in .claude/skills/
description: Agent references a non-existent skill path
suggested_fix: Create `.claude/skills/create_plan/SKILL.md` or update the reference to the existing `plan-agent/SKILL.md`

evidence: Prompt references `.claude/skills/agentica-sdk/SKILL.md` — no `agentica-sdk/` skill folder exists
description: Agent references a non-existent skill path; skill context will be absent
suggested_fix: Create `.claude/skills/agentica-sdk/SKILL.md` or update reference to `agentica-server/SKILL.md`

evidence: Prompt references `.claude/skills/braintrust-analyze/SKILL.md` — no such skill exists; `braintrust-tracing/SKILL.md` is the closest match
description: Agent references a non-existent skill path
suggested_fix: Update reference to `.claude/skills/braintrust-tracing/SKILL.md`

evidence: Agent has no `tools:` frontmatter field but prompt body runs Python scripts via Bash and writes output files
description: No tools field declared; agent will silently have no tools or inherit all from parent, neither of which is the intended behavior
suggested_fix: Add `tools: [Bash, Read, Write, Grep, Glob]` to frontmatter

evidence: Agent has no `tools:` field but prompt runs `artifact_query.py` via Bash; Bash is unavailable without declaration
description: No tools field; the agent's core function (running artifact_query.py) requires Bash which is not declared
suggested_fix: Add `tools: [Bash, Read, Grep, Glob]` to frontmatter

evidence: Tools declares [Read, Grep, Glob] but prompt shows `git diff HEAD` and `uv run pytest` commands that require Bash
description: Agent runs shell commands in its instructions but Bash is not in the declared tools list
suggested_fix: Add `Bash` to the tools list: `tools: [Read, Grep, Glob, Bash]`

evidence: Tools declares [Read, Grep, Glob] but prompt shows `rp-cli snapshot` and `rp-cli switch` commands requiring Bash
description: Agent's rp-cli workflow requires Bash but it is not declared in tools
suggested_fix: Add `Bash` to the tools list: `tools: [Read, Grep, Glob, Bash]`

evidence: Tools declares [Read, Grep, Glob] but prompt shows `cat FILE` and `rp-cli` bash commands
description: Agent shows bash-dependent workflow without Bash declared in tools
suggested_fix: Add `Bash` to the tools list: `tools: [Read, Grep, Glob, Bash]`

evidence: Tools declares [Read, Grep, Glob] but 'Verification Commands' section shows bash commands that require Bash
description: Agent has a verification workflow that requires Bash but it is not declared in tools
suggested_fix: Add `Bash` to the tools list: `tools: [Read, Grep, Glob, Bash]`

evidence: Frontmatter line 2: `name: planning-agent` but file is at `.claude/skills/plan-agent/SKILL.md`; skill activation by folder name `plan-agent` will find a skill declaring a different name
description: Skill's declared name (planning-agent) does not match its folder path (plan-agent); causes confusion in skill activation and cross-references
suggested_fix: Change frontmatter to `name: plan-agent` to match the folder name

evidence: Frontmatter line 4: `user_invocable: true` — canonical field name uses hyphen: `user-invocable`
description: Non-standard frontmatter field name (underscore vs hyphen); parsers checking for `user-invocable` will silently miss this skill's invocability declaration
suggested_fix: Change `user_invocable` to `user-invocable` in the frontmatter

evidence: Frontmatter: `model: haiku` — project rule `.claude/rules/no-haiku.md` explicitly states: 'Never use model: haiku when spawning agents via the Task tool'
description: validate-agent uses model: haiku in violation of the project's no-haiku rule
suggested_fix: Remove the model field entirely (inherit from parent) or set `model: sonnet`

evidence: No `tools:` field present in frontmatter; agent inherits all parent tools
description: Agent has no tools field; least-privilege principle violated
suggested_fix: Add `tools: [Read, Bash, Grep, Glob]` (or appropriate subset) to frontmatter

evidence: No `tools:` field in frontmatter
description: Agent has no tools field
suggested_fix: Add `tools: [Read, Grep, Glob]` to frontmatter

evidence: No `tools:` field in frontmatter
description: Agent has no tools field; in addition to the model violation, this agent lacks tool constraints
suggested_fix: Add `tools: [Read, Grep, Glob]` to frontmatter
